title: Consititution of CWC during 26.06.1997
text: THE GAZETIE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PART II-SEc. 3 (ii)] MINISTRY OF WELFARE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 26th June, 1997 S.O, 464(E),-In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) and (2) of section 9 of the Wakf Act, 1995 (43 of 1995). the Central Government hereby establishes with effect from the 26th day of June, 1997. a council 10 be called the Central Wakf Council consisting of the following Chairperson and members. namely :_ (1) Union Minister in charge ofWakf Appointed under sub-clause (i) of Chairperson clause (b) of sub-section (2) of section 9.
